Query.Sql: select distinct Record ->> '$.Urological.UrologicalCore.UrologicalCoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, Record ->> '$.Urological.UrologicalCore.UrologicalCoreLinkageDiagnosticDetails.ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis' as DateOfPrimaryDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed, Record ->> '$.Urological.UrologicalCore.UrologicalCoreClinicalNurseSpecialistAndRiskFactorAssessments.AlcoholHistoryCancerBeforeLastThreeMonths.@code' as AlcoholHistoryCancerBeforeLastThreeMonths from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81 where type = 'UR' and NhsNumber is not null and AlcoholHistoryCancerBeforeLastThreeMonths is not null and DateOfPrimaryDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed is not null;

Explanation.Description: The date the Primary Cancer was confirmed or the Primary Cancer diagnosis was clinically agreed.
Explanation.Origin: DATE OF PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED)

Explanation.Description: Past history of alcohol consumption for the patient during a cancer care spell.
Explanation.Origin: ALCOHOL HISTORY (CANCER BEFORE LAST THREE MONTHS)
